dataset_name: Synthetic D7 portable retrieval smoke fixture

adjudication.protocol: Synthetic smoke fixture: exact contrary span is pre-specified for workflow verification only.
adjudication.notes: Synthetic smoke fixture aligned to the retrieval candidate span to verify portable D7 package plumbing; this is not expert adjudication or methodological-validity evidence.

contrary_evidence.quote_text:
AI failed badly after rollout. Nurses said the tool slowed triage and caused rework.
A later team reported modest improvements only after manual overrides were added.
